[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000 2
1 0010001 2
2 0010101 3
3 0110100 3
4 0111111 6
5 0101111 5
6 0100010 2
7 0111111 6

01 10 0111111 6 match 4 7
12 21 0101111 5 match 5

56 65 0011001 3
67 76 0010101 3 match 2
70 07 0110101 4

25 52 0111010 4
36 63 0110011 4
47 74 0011101 4

61 16 0111111 6 match 4 7
